literal_translation.text:

g Winch No. 2 wire

layout_notes: The page is a graphical harness layout. Connector and ground callouts, connector shapes, cavity numbers, leader lines, harness colors, and the engine-bay drawing are preserved as source structure rather than converted into English prose.
Source-local connector identifiers retain printed case and include upper- and lower-case prefixes.
The grid uses numeric columns 1-6 and alphabetic rows A-D.
